title: penstemon mensarum
intro: Penstemon mensarum, also known as Mexican Foxglove or Penstemon, is a species of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Penstemon mensarum include alleviating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as soothing sore throats and wounds. The herbal preparations of Penstemon mensarum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for various ways to harness its medicinal properties.
